description_long: This is a sealed, upright bag of Terrazú Café Soluble, a Colombian instant coffee product. The packaging is a metallic, reflective bag with a rich brown-gold color and a crinkled, flexible surface. The front of the bag prominently displays the brand name 'Terrazú' in bold black script, along with the words 'Café Soluble' and a circular logo featuring a coffee bean silhouette. The back of the bag contains detailed product information, including preparation instructions, nutritional facts, and a barcode. The sides of the bag are narrower, with one side showing additional branding and the other listing preparation and nutritional details. The bag appears to be filled with air and granulated coffee, giving it a slightly puffed, rectangular shape with a sealed top.
description: A metallic brown-gold bag of Terrazú instant coffee with bold black branding and detailed product information on the back. The packaging is reflective, crinkled, and stands upright.
description_view_0: The narrow side of the bag, showing the 'Terrazú' logo and a partial circular graphic, with minimal text.
description_view_1: The back of the bag, featuring detailed product information, nutritional labeling, a barcode, and storage instructions.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side, displaying preparation instructions and nutritional information in small print.
description_view_3: The front of the bag, prominently showing the 'Terrazú Café Soluble' branding and a large circular coffee bean logo.
attribute_brand_logo: The front and side of the bag display the 'Terrazú' brand logo in bold black script, accompanied by a circular coffee bean graphic in black. The logo is located centrally on the front and vertically on one side.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Café Soluble' and 'El aroma de Colombia desde 1971' indicate it is Colombian instant coffee. No specific flavor variant is shown.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and preparation instructions are visible on the back and one side of the bag, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredient details.
